description: Variant branches for The Escape. Contains optional/alternative paths that branch from and rejoin the core spine.

nodes.label: Recapture
nodes.definition: The escape attempt fails and the protagonist is recaptured, facing worse conditions than before. This variant forces a second, harder attempt or redefines the escape as internal.
exit_conditions: The protagonist must choose between despair and a new plan
typical_variants: The outside world is itself a prison
failure_modes: Recapture feels like padding rather than escalation
No new information or stakes come from the recapture

edges.label: Caught
edges.preconditions: The escape attempt fails at a critical point
edges.effects_on_stakes: Stakes escalate — the protagonist now faces worse conditions
edges.effects_on_character: Despair threatens; the protagonist must find deeper reserves
edges.common_alternatives: Caught by the antagonist; caught by circumstance; betrayed
edges.anti_patterns: Recapture has no consequences — the protagonist simply tries again

edges.label: Tries Again
edges.preconditions: Recapture has occurred; the protagonist finds new resolve or new means
edges.effects_on_stakes: The second attempt carries even higher stakes — there will not be a third chance
edges.effects_on_character: Deepened determination; the confinement has forged something harder
edges.common_alternatives: New plan based on what was learned from failure; same plan adapted
edges.anti_patterns: Second attempt is identical to the first with no adaptation
